subject: [PATCH v4 12/21] swap: implement the swap_cgroup API using virtual swap

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: The patch series is a good start, but some concerns were raised about the implementation of swap_cgroup API using virtual swap. The reviewer suggested that more work is needed to address these issues.

2026-03-18.patch_summary: This patch series aims to implement the swap_cgroup API using virtual swap, decoupling a swap entry from its backing store and dynamically allocating memory for swap cgroup information on demand. This change is expected to reduce memory overhead in large but sparsely used swap spaces.
